mission: Help B2B startups and SaaS companies launch products faster with AI-powered go-to-market execution. Get to 15 paying clients at $3,000-$5,000/mo within 90 days.

product_1.name: AI GTM Sprint
product_1.description: 14-day go-to-market blitz. We build your ICP, messaging, cold email sequences, landing page copy, and LinkedIn strategy.

product_2.name: Managed AI GTM Retainer
product_2.description: Ongoing AI-powered lead gen, content, outreach, and pipeline management. We ARE your marketing and sales team.
includes: Cold email campaign management & A/B testing

upsell.name: AI Sales Enablement Training
upsell.description: Team training on AI tools, ChatGPT for sales, prompt engineering for prospecting.

target_verticals: B2B SaaS Startups (seed to Series A)
customer_pain_points: Burned through runway on marketing that doesn't convert
Founders doing sales themselves instead of building product
Can't afford a full GTM team ($200K+/year) but need one
No structured ICP or messaging framework
Poor email/LinkedIn response rates (2-5% when should be 15-25%)
Unable to generate qualified pipeline at scale
proof_points: One SaaS startup went from 0 to 47 qualified demos in 30 days using our AI GTM system
API company reduced cost-per-qualified-lead from $200 to $45
MarTech founder closed 3 enterprise deals ($50K ARR) within 60 days of GTM Sprint
Professional services firm built 6-month pipeline of $500K+ in 45 days
Founder reclaimed 15 hours/week previously spent on sales, reinvested in product
